package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for slice_membership_in_loop_map_candidate: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: slices.Contains(...) or slices.Index(...) used inside loops against a stable-looking slice binding.
type CaseSliceMembershipInLoopMapCandidateDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSliceMembershipInLoopMapCandidateModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSliceMembershipInLoopMapCandidateRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSliceMembershipInLoopMapCandidateModel
}

type CaseSliceMembershipInLoopMapCandidateService struct {
    repo *CaseSliceMembershipInLoopMapCandidateRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSliceMembershipInLoopMapCandidateAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeSliceMembershipInLoopMapCandidate(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSliceMembershipInLoopMapCandidateDTO) error {
    focus := "slice_membership_in_loop_map"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    seen := make(map[string]bool, len(items))
    for _, item := range items { seen[item.ID] = true }
    copied := make([]CaseSliceMembershipInLoopMapCandidateDTO, 0, len(items))
    copied = append(copied, items...)
    normalized := strings.ToLower(input)
    for _, item := range items { _ = normalized; _ = item.ID }
    slice_membership_loop_map_candidate_negative := map[string]int{"slice": 1, "membership": 2, "loop": 3, "map": 4, "candidate": 5}
    slice_membership_loop_map_candidate_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    slice_negative_0 := slice_membership_loop_map_candidate_negative["slice"] + len(input)
    _ = slice_negative_0
    membership_negative_1 := slice_membership_loop_map_candidate_negative["membership"] + len(input)
    _ = membership_negative_1
    for loop_negative_2Index, item := range items { slice_membership_loop_map_candidate_negative[item.ID] = loop_negative_2Index }
    map_negative_3 := slice_membership_loop_map_candidate_negative["map"] + len(input)
    _ = map_negative_3
    candidate_negative_4 := slice_membership_loop_map_candidate_negative["candidate"] + len(input)
    _ = candidate_negative_4
    return nil
}
